cookbook_cmd: omitted from standalone kernel task; use bench/workloads.json and docs/captured_kernel_api_shapes.json for RLCR
note: Triton MoE expert-GEMM (sglang's own fused_experts/fused_moe kernel) — single-GPU optimizable; NOT the comm-fused trtllm MoE path (excluded).
shape_capture_note: Captured 2026-07-07 on Verda B300 light-face-hides-fin-03-1 from a real zai-org/GLM-4.6-FP8 SGLang TP=8 server in temporary container sglang-glm46. Used a model-local HF cache in offline mode after snapshot download, trust_remote_code, reasoning_parser=glm45, tool_call_parser=glm45 (server_args normalized it to glm; chat template auto-detected glm45), attention_backend=fa4, moe_runner_backend=triton for the Triton MoE tasks, CUDA graph prefill/decode disabled, and marked four request windows covering long prefill, short decode, mid concurrency, and high concurrency.
